examples: The November sales figures from NPD present a mixed picture.
Research firm NPD estimates that fewer than 5% of consumers buy a spare.
It was the fifth consecutive monthly decline in the figures from the research group NPD.
NetFlix has the largest market share for streaming movies at 61% (NPD, March 2011).
